summary:
All tests passed. 

**The needle:** The nginx reverse proxy configuration in `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default` had the upstream port set to `5001`, but the Flask application listens on port `5000`. 

**The fix:** Changed `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` to `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;` so that nginx correctly forwards `/api/` requests to the Flask backend.
